author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Plan: PyTorch fuses the GRU gate computations into a single kernel that computes all three gates (reset, update, new) in one pass, then applies the gating in a second fused kernel. Our GRU currently does each gate as separate matmul + sigmoid + multiply ops. 

The fix: add a fused GRU cell PTX kernel that takes (input, hidden, weight_ih, weight_hh, bias) and outputs (new_hidden) in a single kernel launch, eliminating ~6 intermediate tensor allocations per timestep.

Starting by checking the current GRU implementation.
